courses.title: Fundamentals of Neuroscience
courses.description: Electrical properties in individual neurons, building up a foundation for understanding the fundamental function of the nervous system.

courses.title: Computational Neuroscience
courses.description: Foundation in how neurons encode and process information, from single neuron dynamics to population-level computation

courses.title: Brain-Computer Interfaces
courses.description: Comprehensive overview of BCI systems, paradigms, and applications from engineering perspective

courses.title: Digital Signal Processing
courses.description: Mathematical foundations of DSP with applications to biomedical signals

courses.title: Medical Neuroscience
courses.description: Clinical and anatomical foundations of neuroscience from medical perspective

researchInterests.title: Closed-Loop Neural Implants
researchInterests.description: Adaptive neurostimulation systems for treatment-resistant depression and other psychiatric conditions

researchInterests.title: Communication BCIs for Locked-In Patients
researchInterests.description: Real-time decoding systems enabling communication for individuals with complete paralysis

researchInterests.title: Cortical Visual Prosthetics
researchInterests.description: Restoring functional vision through direct cortical stimulation, inspired by Science Corp's pioneering work

researchInterests.title: Computational Neuroscience of Cognition
researchInterests.description: Understanding how the brain encodes information, makes decisions, and processes complex cognitive tasks

papers.title: Brain-Computer Interfaces: A Review
papers.notes: Classic overview of BCI paradigms, applications, and challenges

papers.title: Optimizing Spatial Filters for Robust EEG Single-Trial Analysis
papers.notes: Foundational paper on Common Spatial Patterns for motor imagery BCI
